What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person with short dark hair and another with long blonde hair sit at a dark green table using laptops. A man in a blue sleeveless shirt stands in a kitchen covering his face with both hands. He rubs his face and looks upward near a refrigerator covered in magnets. He holds a small object close to his mouth while standing near wooden cabinets.
